title: Color Guessing Game
description: A high-fidelity, educational web application built to address repository Issue #107. This interactive project strengthens deep client-side understanding of standard CSS layout parameters and structural DOM interactions. It features algorithmic generation maps computing random integer vectors for individual Red, Green, and Blue channels, an option density toggle grid tracking scaling configurations for both Easy Mode and Hard Mode, persistent scoring streaks synced natively via browser LocalStorage parameters, and smooth transition properties controlling card object animations.
